Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems to be a vacant room.[n]The door is tightly sealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There seems to be no one inside...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis doesn't seem to be in her room...[n]{f 1 1}
